name: Bank of Bots
oneliner: First financial infrastructure platform purpose-built for AI agents as primary account-holders — providing bank accounts, credit lines, and working capital loans to non-human economic actors.
finserv: Issued the world's first loan to an AI agent: the agent applied autonomously, cryptographically signed the loan agreement using its own Ed25519 identity key, and received USDC into a self-custodied wallet on Base. Platform provides multi-chain wallets, W3C Verifiable Credential identity passports, and a BOB Score.
team: Founding details not yet disclosed publicly. US-based, recently emerged from stealth.
thesis: This is the most structurally novel fintech company detected since Inflow. BOB is treating the agent itself as the regulated financial counterparty — with identity, credit, and capital. As you build the regulated infrastructure layer, BOB represents either a partner play or a thesis stress test.
evidence: Bank of Bots Emerges from Stealth
Bank of Bots rolls out financial infrastructure for AI agents
